items.title: Raise Fund for Clean & Healthy Water
items.excerpt:
Contaminated water is a silent killer, responsible for over 1.4 million deaths annually, including thousands of children under five who die every single day from preventable waterborne diseases like cholera and dysentery. In many communities in Yola, women and children walk miles just to fetch dirty water, sacrificing education, safety, and hope.

Our mission: we are launching an urgent medical and humanitarian initiative to provide clean, safe, and sustainable water solutions to underserved communities. Your donation will fund the construction of wells, water filtration systems, and sanitation facilities, while also supporting hygiene education programs that prevent disease and save lives.

items.title: Send a Child Back to School
items.excerpt: Provide books, uniforms and fees so vulnerable children can stay in school and build a future.

items.title: Primary Healthcare Outreach
items.excerpt: Support free medical outreaches delivering check-ups, medicines and maternal care to remote areas.

items.title: Skills & Livelihood Training
items.excerpt: Empower youth and women with vocational skills and start-up support to earn a sustainable income.

items.title: Protecting Vulnerable Families
items.excerpt: Advance human-rights awareness and protection for displaced and vulnerable populations.

items.title: Greener Communities Initiative
items.excerpt: Tree-planting and clean-up drives that protect the environment and build climate resilience.
